title: pitcairnia croatii
intro: Pitcairnia croatii, also known as Croat's pineapple, is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family. It is primarily found in Mexico and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory conditions. Traditionally, Pitcairnia croatii is prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also sometimes used in herbal tinctures and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
